plugins.name: integrate-claudecode
plugins.description: Integrate Claude Code into a Docker/VSCode Devcontainer project.

plugins.name: sdd-setup
plugins.description: Skills and a builder agent for scaffolding AI-driven development containers: create projects, add Claude Code, Beads, and OpenSpec. Includes shared lifecycle scripts, Dockerfile/devcontainer templates, and a troubleshooting agent.

plugins.name: sdd-workflow
plugins.description: A suite of workflow skills for OpenSpec/Beads-driven development: distill workflows, generate roadmaps, create Beads task graphs, drive implementation, and audit spec completion.
